blocked.title: Access suspended
blocked.cancelled: Your subscription has been cancelled. Resubscribe to access the platform.
blocked.expired: Your subscription has expired. Renew it to continue using {appName}.
blocked.trial_ended: Your trial period has ended. Subscribe to continue using {appName}.

dashboard.overview: Overview of your activity over the last 7 days
dashboard.cta_connect_desc: Link a session to start receiving and automating your conversations.
dashboard.cta_agent_desc: Let AI qualify and reply to your contacts automatically.
dashboard.cta_explore_desc: Explore your detailed statistics to optimize your performance.
dashboard.home_subtitle: Your connection hub. Link your channels and your store so your AI agents can take over.
dashboard.recent_activity_sub: What {appName} has done on your store.
dashboard.activity_empty: Nothing yet. Connect WhatsApp and your store to see your agent's activity.
dashboard.metric_handled_hint: Conversations the agent handled on its own
dashboard.article_1_title: 7 WhatsApp automations that save 10 hours a week
dashboard.article_1_excerpt: Automate support, FAQs, orders, and cart recovery.
dashboard.article_2_title: How to boost your conversion rate with WhatsApp
dashboard.article_2_excerpt: Replying in under a minute significantly increases your sales.
dashboard.article_3_title: Build your first Shopify AI agent in under 5 minutes
dashboard.article_3_excerpt: Connect Shopify, WhatsApp Business, and launch your agent.

sessions.title: Sessions & channels
sessions.description: Manage your WhatsApp connections and email accounts. Each session is a communication channel.
sessions.no_sessions_desc: Create your first WhatsApp session to get started.
sessions.invalid_token: Invalid or expired Meta token. Check your Access Token.
sessions.waba_created: WhatsApp API session created and connected!
sessions.session_created_pairing: Session created, enter the code in WhatsApp
sessions.session_created_qr: Session created, scan the QR code
sessions.scan_qr_desc: Open WhatsApp on your phone, go to Linked Devices, and scan this QR code.
sessions.pairing_desc: Open WhatsApp, go to Linked Devices, then enter this code.
sessions.code_expires: The code expires after a few minutes
sessions.session_name_desc: Custom name to easily identify this session.
sessions.teams_desc: Members of selected teams will be able to access this session according to their permissions.
sessions.teams_empty: This session is only accessible by you.
sessions.daily_limit_desc: Maximum number of AI-sent messages per day for this session. Leave empty = no limit.
sessions.delay_desc: Wait time between each automatic message (AI or campaign) sent from this session. Protects against anti-spam detection. Leave empty = no delay.
sessions.qr_desc: Scan the QR code with WhatsApp to connect your number.
sessions.phone_desc: Enter your number with country code, without + or spaces.
sessions.waba_webhook_title: Configure the webhook in Meta Business Suite:
sessions.waba_step1: Go to Meta Business Suite > WhatsApp > Configuration
sessions.waba_desc: Connect via the official WhatsApp Business API (Meta Cloud API).
sessions.waba_token_desc: Permanent access token from Meta Business Suite (System User).
sessions.teams_optional_desc: Members of selected teams will be able to access this session according to their permissions.
sessions.teams_optional_empty: This session will only be accessible by you.
sessions.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete the session "{name}"? This will disconnect the WhatsApp number and delete all associated data.

conversations.autotag_desc: The AI automatically classifies conversations into your stages (up to 3).
conversations.new_conversation_desc: Start a WhatsApp conversation with a new number. A Meta-approved template is required (the only option allowed outside the 24h window).
conversations.no_approved_templates: No approved templates. Create one under {templates} and get it approved by Meta.
conversations.recontact_desc: This customer hasn't written in over 24h. WhatsApp no longer allows free-form text: choose a Meta-approved template to reach out.
conversations.no_approved_templates_short: No approved templates. Create one under Templates and get it approved by Meta.
conversations.drag_to_see_templates: Scroll horizontally to see all templates →
conversations.table_load_error: Unable to load the contacts table
conversations.sync_success: {saved} order(s) synced, {linked} linked to a contact.
conversations.refund_notified_fail: Refund completed, but message not sent: {reason}
conversations.refund_done_msg_fail: Refund completed, but message not sent.
conversations.refund_desc: Review the reason, amount and method before refunding. This action is final on Shopify.
conversations.refund_original_method_before: The refund is issued to the customer's
conversations.notify_client_refund: Notify the customer of the refund
conversations.notify_link_placeholder: Link to include (optional), e.g. tracking, policy…
conversations.notify_message_template: Hello, your refund of {amount} for order {order} has been issued to your payment method.
conversations.no_macros: No macros. Create some under Settings → Macros.
conversations.out_of_window_desc: This customer hasn't written in over {hours}. WhatsApp no longer allows free-form messages, use an approved template to reach out.
conversations.automation_link_title: View the automation that sent this message
conversations.no_orders_found: No orders found for this customer.

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.description: Create intelligent agents to automatically respond on WhatsApp.
agents.no_agents_desc: Create your first AI agent to automate your WhatsApp responses.
agents.name_prompt_required: Name and system prompt are required
agents.create_desc: Configure an AI agent to automatically respond on WhatsApp.
agents.teams_desc: Members of selected teams will be able to use this agent.
agents.teams_empty: This agent is only accessible by you.
agents.description_placeholder: E.g.: Support agent for answering frequently asked questions
agents.type_help: Conversation: responds via exclusive link, after qualification or follow-up. Qualifier: responds to all messages on a session and can redirect. Follow-up: personalizes campaign messages (Scale plan only).
agents.qualifier_routes_help: Define scenarios that trigger redirection to a specialized agent.
agents.qualifier_route_description_placeholder: E.g.: Contact asks about pricing, offers, or wants to buy a product
agents.qualifier_route_none: No scenarios configured. Add scenarios so the qualifier can redirect.
agents.qualifier_session_help: This agent automatically intercepts new messages without an assigned agent.
agents.prompt_placeholder: E.g.: You are a customer support assistant for company X...
agents.prompt_help: Instructions given to the AI to define its behavior and personality.
agents.objective_placeholder: E.g.: Qualify leads and book appointments
agents.delay_help: Random delay between min and max before responding. Groups consecutive messages and simulates human behavior. 0/0 = immediate response.
agents.limits_help: The agent stops responding after N messages or if the conversation has been inactive for X minutes. Leave empty = no limit.
agents.schedule_limit: Limit the agent to specific time slots
agents.lang_detection_desc: Automatically responds in the user's language
agents.booking_help: Booking URL (Calendly, Cal.com...). The agent can share a tracked link.
agents.escalation_desc: Disables AI if the customer is upset
agents.escalation_keywords_placeholder: talk to a human, angry, refund, complaint...
agents.escalation_keywords_help: AI will be disabled if one of these keywords is detected in the customer's message.
agents.escalation_message_placeholder: I understand your frustration. An advisor will take over...
agents.escalation_message_help: This message will be sent to the customer before disabling AI.
agents.stop_condition_placeholder: E.g.: Stop the conversation after sending the Calendly booking link
agents.stop_condition_help: Describe in plain language when the agent should automatically stop responding. The AI will analyze each response to check if this condition is met.
agents.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete the agent "{name}"? This action is irreversible.
agents.prompt_min_error: Write a prompt of at least 10 characters first
agents.wizard_created_kb: Agent created with its knowledge base!
agents.onboarding_title: Let's create your first AI agent
agents.onboarding_subtitle: A smart agent that automatically responds to your customers, 24/7.
agents.paid_plan_notice: The AI agent is reserved for paid plans.
agents.auto_preconfigured: We've pre-configured it from your store: you review and activate.
agents.referent_tooltip: The default agent is the one that answers ALL of the store's WhatsApp conversations.
agents.how_configure: How do you want to configure it?
agents.automatic_desc: Pre-configured from your store (support, order tracking, advice). You review and activate.
agents.manual_desc: Create a blank agent and configure everything yourself in its settings.
agents.default_agent_prompt: You are an e-commerce assistant. Respond to the store's customers helpfully and reliably.
agents.objective_placeholder_detail: Qualify prospects and propose an appointment
agents.no_personal_doc: No personal document · Add a PDF or text →
agents.media_subtitle: Image, video or document the agent can send (24h support window)
agents.human_transfer_hint: If the customer asks for it
agents.response_delay_hint: Wait time before the agent responds
agents.max_messages_hint: The agent pauses after N replies in a conversation (0 = unlimited)
agents.ask_before_cutoff_hint: At the limit, send a button message "Do you want to continue with the assistant?". The AI pauses; the customer reactivates it by clicking the right button.
agents.no_approved_template_buttons: No approved template with buttons. Create one in Templates (with "Yes / No" buttons).
agents.button_reactivates_help: This button reactivates the AI. The others (e.g. "No") keep it paused.
agents.stop_condition_placeholder_detail: E.g.: if the customer confirmed their appointment…
agents.enable_schedule_hint: The agent only responds during these slots
agents.no_doc_to_attach: No document to attach. Upload one below.
agents.doc_content_used: Content used by the agent to respond.
agents.delete_document_desc_suffix: and the file will be permanently deleted. This action is irreversible.
agents.media_library_desc: Reuse a media already sent by another agent. A media belongs to a single agent; "Share" makes it available to all.
agents.no_media_other_agent: No media attached to another agent.
agents.add_media_desc: The agent can send it to the customer during support (without a template).
agents.file_hint_image: jpeg, png, webp, gif, max 5 MB
agents.onboard_q_langs: Which languages does it respond in?
agents.onboard_q_transfer: When should it hand off to a human?
agents.onboard_tone_deduced: Deduced from your store, adjust if needed.
agents.onboard_delay_natural: A slight delay makes the exchange more natural ("human" effect).
agents.onboard_transfer_label: Transfer to a human advisor when necessary
agents.onboard_transfer_explain: An AI analyzes each message: as soon as one of the situations below occurs, the agent deactivates on the conversation and you are notified to take over from the tab
agents.onboard_situations_label: Situations that trigger the transfer (detected by AI)
agents.onboard_situations_placeholder: E.g.: the customer is unhappy or aggressive; they threaten to leave a bad review or file a complaint; they explicitly ask for a human; dispute over a refund above €50; a question the agent can't answer…
agents.onboard_situations_help: Leave empty to use default detection (insults, threats, aggression, explicit request for a human).
agents.onboard_instructions_generated: Generated from your store. Adjust freely.
agents.onboard_fb_transfer_on: Well done, your customers will be in good hands 🤝

campaigns.title: Follow-up Campaigns
campaigns.description: Re-engage your inactive contacts with personalized messages.
campaigns.no_campaigns_desc: Create your first campaign to re-engage your inactive contacts.
campaigns.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete the campaign "{name}"? This action is irreversible.
campaigns.new_desc: Configure a follow-up campaign for your inactive contacts.
campaigns.teams_desc: Select teams that will have access to this campaign
campaigns.message_desc: Use an AI agent to personalize each message, or a fixed template.
campaigns.create_relance_help: Create an agent with the "follow-up" type in the AI Agents page.
campaigns.message_template_placeholder: Hello! It's been a while since we last connected...
campaigns.message_template_help: This message will be sent identically to all contacts.
campaigns.conversation_agent_desc: This agent will take over to respond to contacts after the follow-up message.
campaigns.targeting_desc: Define the criteria to select contacts for follow-up.
campaigns.links_help: Target contacts who came through these specific links
campaigns.lifecycle_desc: Target only contacts in these pipeline stages
campaigns.inactivity_help: Contacts with no message for at least {days} days
campaigns.exclude_replied_desc: Only include contacts who have not replied
campaigns.anti_ban_desc: Limits to avoid being blocked by WhatsApp.
campaigns.min_days_help: Do not recontact someone contacted by campaign less than {days} days ago
campaigns.no_eligible: No eligible contacts with these criteria
campaigns.delete_recipients_desc: Are you sure you want to remove {count} recipient(s) from this campaign?
campaigns.cancel_campaign_desc: Are you sure you want to cancel this campaign? Unsent messages will be abandoned.
campaigns.edit_locked: This campaign can no longer be edited (running or completed).
campaigns.edit_status_locked: This campaign is in "{status}" status and cannot be edited.

settings.title: Settings
settings.avatar_note: URL of an image for your profile picture.
settings.subscription_info: Check the status of your subscription, subscribe or manage your payment.
settings.tokens_info: If you reach your token limit, you can purchase additional tokens. Purchased tokens are added to your monthly quota.
settings.timezone_note: Used for date display and campaign scheduling.
settings.theme_note: The "System" theme follows your browser preferences.
settings.password_too_short: New password must be at least 8 characters
settings.data_info: Download a ZIP archive containing all your data: profile, sessions, contacts, conversations, messages, AI agents, documents, campaigns, and teams.
settings.legal_desc: View our legal documents and privacy policy.
settings.retention_desc: Set how long your messages are kept.
settings.retention_note: Messages older than this duration will be automatically deleted. Conversations and contacts will be kept.
settings.retention_warning: Messages older than {months} months will be automatically purged.
settings.purge_filters_desc: Refine the purge by selecting specific tags or message types. Without filters, all old messages will be deleted.
settings.purge_confirm: You are about to permanently delete messages older than {months} months.
settings.purge_media: Including {count} media file(s) that will be deleted from storage.
settings.purge_none: No messages to delete. All your messages are recent.
settings.lifecycle_desc: Configure the automatic analysis frequency to classify your conversations.
settings.lifecycle_manual_note: Analysis will only be triggered manually from the Lifecycle or Conversations page.
settings.lifecycle_every_note: Each incoming message will automatically classify the conversation.
settings.lifecycle_n_note: Analysis will be triggered every {n} incoming messages.
settings.delete_account_info: This action will permanently delete your account and all your data: WhatsApp sessions, contacts, conversations, AI agents, documents, campaigns, etc. This action is irreversible.
settings.delete_dialog_warning: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
settings.referral_desc: Refer friends and you each earn 500,000 tokens on their first payment.
settings.notif_sounds_desc: Play a sound on each incoming message
settings.oauth_no_password: Your account is connected via Google. You don't have a password set on
settings.oauth_set_password_hint: You can set one to be able to log in with email/password.
settings.password_email_sent: Email sent, check your inbox to set your password.
settings.help_center_desc: Quickly find an answer to your questions.
settings.data_deletion_email_hint: You can also request deletion of your data by email.

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle
lifecycle.description: Automatically classify your conversations by stage.
lifecycle.no_stages_desc: Create stages to classify your conversations.
lifecycle.delete_stage_desc: The stage "{name}" will be deleted. Associated conversations will be unclassified.
lifecycle.new_stage_desc: Add a new stage to your pipeline.
lifecycle.pipeline_desc: Drag and drop to reorder stages.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Add documents that your AI agents can reference to enhance their responses.
knowledge.no_documents_desc: Add your first document to enrich your AI agents' knowledge.
knowledge.assign_agents_desc: Select the AI agents that will be able to access this document.
knowledge.no_agents_for_kb: No AI agents created. Create an agent to associate it with this document.
knowledge.edit_document_desc: Edit the content of your document.
knowledge.new_document_desc: Add a text document or PDF file to your knowledge base.
knowledge.description_placeholder: E.g.: Frequently asked questions by customers
knowledge.description_placeholder_new: E.g.: Complete product and service catalog
knowledge.content_placeholder: Paste your document content here: company information, FAQ, product descriptions...
knowledge.content_help: The text will be split into chunks and indexed for semantic search.
knowledge.pdf_help: Max 10 MB. Text will be automatically extracted from the PDF.
knowledge.edit_help: Editing the content will restart processing (chunking + embeddings).
knowledge.teams_desc: Members of selected teams will be able to access this document.
knowledge.teams_empty: This document is only accessible by you.
knowledge.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete the document "{name}"? This action is irreversible.

links.title: WhatsApp Links
links.description: Create wa.me links with tracking and pre-filled messages.
links.no_sessions: No WhatsApp session connected. Connect a session to create links.
links.no_links_desc: Create your first WhatsApp link to start tracking.
links.copy_wame: Copy direct wa.me link (for Google My Business, etc.)
links.new_desc: Create a wa.me link with a pre-filled message and tracking.
links.prefill_placeholder: E.g.: Hello, I'm coming from your website!
links.agent_help: The agent will automatically respond to conversations initiated through this link.
links.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete the link "{name}"? This action is irreversible.
links.teams_desc: Members of selected teams will be able to access this link.
links.teams_empty: This link is only accessible by you.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Manage your tags to organize your conversations.
tags.create_desc: Add a new tag with a name and color.
tags.your_tags_desc: Edit or delete your existing tags.
tags.delete_desc: The tag {name} will be removed from all conversations. This action is irreversible.

tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: Connect external APIs for your agent to use
tools.catalog_desc: Choose a service to connect to your AI agent
tools.config_desc: Configure the tool credentials and permissions
tools.dialog_desc: Manage the API tools connected to this agent
tools.edit_desc: Modify tool settings. Empty secret fields keep the existing value.
tools.edit_secret_hint: Leave secret fields empty to keep current values.
tools.cred_reusable_hint: This credential will be reusable across other agents
tools.delete_credential_confirm: Delete this credential? Associated tools will lose their connection.
tools.delete_desc: The tool {name} will be disconnected from the agent. This action is irreversible.

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: Create or join a team to share your resources.
teams.no_teams_desc: Create a team or join one with a code.
teams.new_team_desc: Create a team then invite members with invitation codes.
teams.invite_desc: Generate a single-use invitation code with desired permissions.
teams.invite_code_help: Share this code. It can only be used once.
teams.delete_team_desc: This action is irreversible. Members will lose access to shared resources.
teams.permissions_desc: Define the resources this member can access.
teams.no_knowledge_team: No knowledge base in this team

automations.campaigns_desc: Marketing campaigns: button flows, promotions, A/B tests.
automations.transactional_desc: Transactional automations: event → delay → condition → message.
automations.no_campaigns: No campaigns yet. Create your first one.
automations.no_workflows: No workflows yet. Create your first one.
automations.how_create: How would you like to create it?
automations.ai_assistant_desc: Chat with the AI: it builds a full flow (multiple messages, delays, conditions, A/B test).
automations.manual_creation_desc: Build the flow yourself, block by block, in the visual editor.
automations.empty_hint: Select a workflow or create one.
automations.confirm_delete_folder: Delete the folder "{name}"? Workflows inside it will move back to "Unfiled".
automations.toast_created_paused: Created and paused — review it, then activate it with the button at the top.
automations.toast_cannot_activate_drafts: Cannot activate: {names} {verb} not submitted to Meta. Submit {plural} from Templates.
automations.toast_deactivated_unapproved: Workflow deactivated: {names} pending Meta approval. Reactivate it once approved.

builder.birthday_hint: Sent on the customer's birthday (if the date is known in their profile).
builder.button_clicked_hint: Triggers when the customer clicks a quick-reply button with this text.
builder.recurrence_once_desc_abandoned: Each customer is only reminded for their first abandoned cart, never for later ones.
builder.recurrence_once_desc_default: Each customer receives this message only once, permanently.
builder.recurrence_per_event_desc_silence: One reminder per silence: the customer becomes eligible again only if they reply and then go quiet once more.
builder.recurrence_per_event_desc_abandoned: One reminder per abandoned cart, regardless of how many carts the customer has.
builder.recurrence_per_event_desc_default: The message fires again on every new event.
builder.recurrence_daily_desc: At most one message per day per customer.
builder.self_feeding_warning_read: Warning: your message will also be read, which may re-trigger the send. Make sure the rest of the scenario properly stops.
builder.self_feeding_warning_silence: Warning: as long as the customer doesn't reply, the condition stays true. Make sure the rest of the scenario properly stops.
builder.abandoned_once_warning: Warning: a customer already reminded once will never be reminded again, even for a much larger cart. "For every abandoned cart" is the usual setting.
builder.other_buttons_conflict: This template already has {types} buttons: you can't add quick replies (Meta rule).
builder.reclassify_warning: ⚠️ Adding buttons may cause Meta to reclassify this template Utility → Marketing (different pricing and sending rules).
builder.resubmit_notice: ⏳ Saving sends the template back to Meta for review (~a few minutes). It can only be sent once approved.
builder.err_button_duplicate: Two buttons can't have the same text.
builder.err_submit_failed: Template saved, but submission to Meta failed.
builder.create_in_templates_notice: Create it in Templates, then select it below. The automation can't be activated while it's missing.
builder.drafts_label: Drafts ({count}) — usable to build, must be approved by Meta before activating
builder.empty_value_fallback: Without a value, the customer will see "—" instead.
builder.multiple_replies_on_desc: The customer can click several buttons and receive each follow-up (once each).
builder.multiple_replies_off_desc: The customer follows only one reply (the first click ends the journey).
builder.no_stage_defined: No stage defined. Create one in "Manage stages".
builder.move_suite_tooltip: Move this follow-up to another route
builder.move_suite_swap_notice: If the target route already has a follow-up, the two are swapped.
builder.ab_split_desc: Splits contacts between variants. Each variant has its own message.
builder.no_data_yet: No data yet (sends will appear here).
builder.choose_template_for_preview: Choose a template in a "Message" block to see the preview here.
builder.delete_branching_confirm:
This block opens {count} routes. Deleting it keeps only one follow-up — the others will no longer be connected to the journey.

Delete anyway?
builder.ai_placeholder_marketing: E.g. send a promo to inactive customers…
builder.ai_placeholder_event: E.g. when a customer abandons their cart…
builder.ai_help_event: The AI assistant helps you describe the event.
builder.ai_placeholder_condition: E.g. if the order is over €100…
builder.delay_after_event: How long to wait after the event before sending?
builder.fine_tune_notice: After creation, you'll be able to fine-tune in the visual editor.
builder.no_approved_template: No approved template. Create one in "Templates".
builder.toast_event_wrong_tab_marketing: This event is more of a transactional one.
builder.toast_event_wrong_tab_transactional: This event is more of a campaign one.
builder.chat_needs_messages: This journey needs message(s) you don't have yet. Here's what to create, with tips to convert:
builder.chat_submitted_notice: ✓ Sent for review at Meta — approval usually within 24 h.
builder.chat_draft_notice: Saved as a draft. You can edit it in Templates before submitting.
builder.chat_build_with_messages: Build the journey with these messages
builder.chat_messages_created_notice: Your messages are created: I can now assemble the full journey.
builder.chat_drafts_enough_notice: Your drafts are enough to build the journey: they'll be attached automatically. Meta approval is only needed to activate it.
builder.chat_messages_created_attached: {count} message created as a draft, attached automatically to the journey.
builder.chat_messages_created_attached_plural: {count} messages created as drafts, attached automatically to the journey.
builder.chat_review_in_editor: You'll be able to review everything in the editor; Meta approval is only needed to activate it.
builder.chat_workflow_created_missing: The journey will be created but {count} message is still to write (see the tips above). Attach them in the editor before activating.
builder.chat_workflow_created_missing_plural: The journey will be created but {count} messages are still to write (see the tips above). Attach them in the editor before activating.
builder.chat_what_to_change: What would you like to change?
builder.chat_toast_created_submitted: Message created and sent to Meta
builder.chat_saved_draft_meta_refused: Saved as a draft, but Meta refused the submission: {error}
builder.chat_need_template_first: You need to create a template first.
builder.perf_no_sends_desc: Figures will appear as soon as this automation starts sending.
builder.perf_note_with_delivery: Delivered / read: real Meta receipts. Replies and sales: attributed per contact.
builder.perf_note_without_delivery: Opens, replies and sales attributed per contact (approximation).
builder.perf_winner_from_5: Winner determined from 5 sends per variant.
builder.var_hint_promo_code: The discount code created in Shopify (Discounts → Create). The same for all customers of this message.
builder.canvas_hint: Zoom: Ctrl + scroll (or pinch). Move: click-drag the background.
builder.multilang_note: Preview in {lang}. Each customer automatically receives the version in their own language.

trigger.order_created_desc: As soon as an order is placed.
trigger.order_delivered_desc: When the parcel is delivered to the customer.
trigger.return_requested_desc: When a customer opens a return request (support).
trigger.checkout_abandoned_desc: Payment not completed after a delay.
trigger.contact_opted_in_desc: A customer just subscribed on WhatsApp (any source: popup, checkout, thank-you page). Perfect for a welcome message.
trigger.optin_popup_desc: A customer subscribes specifically through the site’s WhatsApp popup (not at checkout). For a message dedicated to visitors who leave their number on the site.
trigger.button_clicked_desc: The customer taps a “quick reply” button in a message (e.g. “Track my order”).
trigger.message_read_desc: The customer just read a sent message (WhatsApp blue double check). Ideal for following up a silent reader.
trigger.no_customer_reply_desc: The customer hasn’t replied for a while (support follow-up).
trigger.order_delivered_caveat: Depends on your carrier: many don’t report delivery to Shopify, so this trigger may never fire. For reliable sending, prefer “Order shipped”.
trigger.order_paid_caveat: Fires on captured payment. An order created manually in the Shopify admin stays “payment pending” and won’t trigger this message.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.no_click_data: Detailed clicks will be recorded from now on. Click one of your links to test.
stats.no_utm_data: Add ?utm_source=... to your links to track traffic sources.
stats.engagement_funnel_sub: What happens to your outbound messages (support replies aren't counted).
stats.funnel_empty: No outbound messages in this period. Numbers will appear as soon as your first automation is sent.
stats.ov_orders_appear_here: Orders will appear here as soon as they come in.
stats.ov_received_sent_daily: Received and sent, day by day.
stats.ab_no_automation_sent: No automation sent in this period
stats.ab_activate_automation_hint: Turn on an automation (abandoned cart, follow-up…) to see your results here.
stats.ab_overview_sub: Your automation messages for the period (support replies are not counted).
stats.ab_summary_one: Out of {sent} message, {ordered} led to a sale.
stats.ab_summary_many: Out of {sent} messages, {ordered} led to a sale.
stats.ab_no_sale_attributed: No sale attributed yet. Sales appear when a customer orders after receiving a message.
stats.ab_ab_tests_sub: Your automations comparing several messages, and the winning variant.
stats.ab_all_automations_sub: Open, reply and sale rates for every active automation.
stats.ab_all_are_ab_tests: All your automations with sends are A/B tests (see above).

logs.title: Webhook Logs
logs.description: History of events received from Evolution API

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.payment_success: Payment successful! Your subscription is now active.
subscription.already_synced: Your subscription is already active! Profile re-synced.
subscription.cancel_confirm_desc: Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period, then it will not be renewed. You can resubscribe at any time.
subscription.cancel_success: Your subscription will be cancelled at the end of the current period.
subscription.sub_billing_approve_in_shopify: . You approve plan changes directly in Shopify — no payment method to enter here.
subscription.sub_free_activate_hint: Without AI — upgrade to a paid plan to enable it
subscription.sub_then_switch_to: then you will switch to the
subscription.sub_credit_definition: 1 credit = 1 conversation your AI agent replied to, regardless of the number of messages.
subscription.sub_credits_note_nothing: Consume nothing: your manual replies, automations and templates sent without AI.
subscription.sub_credits_note_plan_quota: The quota included in your plan resets at each monthly renewal.
subscription.sub_credits_note_recharges: Purchased top-ups take over once that quota is used up, and never expire.
subscription.sub_no_recharge_desc: A top-up adds 500 conversations (€45) that never expire: they take over once the plan quota is used up.
subscription.sub_credits_exhausted: AI credits used up, AI is paused. Top up to keep replying automatically.
subscription.sub_credits_low: You have used more than 80% of your AI credits. Consider topping up soon.
subscription.sub_invoices_payment_method_desc: Your {appName} subscription is billed with your Shopify invoice. Your invoices and payment method are managed in your Shopify admin.
subscription.sub_cancel_immediate_trial: Cancellation is immediate. You will not be charged.
subscription.sub_cancel_end_of_period: Access stays active until the end of the current period. No pro-rata refund.
subscription.sub_cancel_trial_confirm: Your free trial will be cancelled immediately. You will never be charged.
subscription.sub_change_effective_at: The change takes effect at your next renewal{date}. Your current plan stays active until then.
subscription.sub_cancelled_choose_plan: Your subscription has been cancelled. Choose a plan to resubscribe.
subscription.sub_read_accept_terms: Read and accept our terms before proceeding to payment.
subscription.sub_trial_note: 7-day free trial, you will only be charged at the end of the trial period.
subscription.sub_tokens_kept_note: Your current tokens stay available until renewal, then reset with the new plan's limit.
subscription.sub_promo_hint: The discount will show on the Shopify confirmation screen before you confirm.
subscription.sub_accept_terms_prefix: I have read and accept the
subscription.sub_recharge_error: Could not start the credit purchase.
subscription.sub_no_shop_linked: No Shopify store linked. Open the app from your Shopify admin to subscribe.
subscription.sub_cancelled_notice: Subscription cancelled. You keep access until
subscription.sub_resubscribe_below: Pick a plan below to resume.

auth.brand_subtitle: WhatsApp, Email and Shopify in one place. An agent that answers your customers 24/7.
auth.accept_terms: I accept the Terms of Service and the Privacy Policy. I understand that my WhatsApp messages will be processed by artificial intelligence to generate automatic responses.
auth.already_account: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.accept_required: Please accept the terms of service
auth.forgot_desc: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.email_sent_desc: Check your inbox to reset your password.
auth.confirmation_sent: A confirmation email has been sent to {email}. Click the link in the email to activate your account and start your 14-day free trial.
auth.new_password_desc: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.password_updated_desc: Your password has been changed successfully.
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.link_expired_desc: This reset link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.

tour.welcome_desc: This guide walks you through setting up your WhatsApp automation system step by step. You can navigate with arrow keys or the buttons.
tour.dashboard_desc: View your key statistics: sent/received messages, active conversations, new contacts, and AI response rate. Data updates in real-time.
tour.sessions_desc: A session = a connected WhatsApp account. You can connect multiple numbers to manage different activities or teams.
tour.connect_desc: Click here to connect a new account. A QR code will appear: scan it with WhatsApp on your phone (Settings > Connected devices).
tour.agents_desc: AI agents automatically respond to your customers 24/7. Each agent has its own personality, schedule, and behavior.
tour.create_agent_desc: Create an agent by defining: its name, personality (system prompt), active hours, and the WhatsApp sessions it manages.
tour.knowledge_desc: Enrich your agents with documents. The AI will use this information to accurately answer your customers' questions.
tour.add_doc_desc: Upload a PDF (FAQ, catalog, pricing, terms) or paste text. Then assign the document to the agents that should use it.
tour.conversations_desc: View all your WhatsApp conversations. See exchanged messages, history with each contact, and AI responses.
tour.links_desc: Create custom wa.me links to track your contacts' origin. Each link can have a pre-filled message and an assigned agent.
tour.campaigns_desc: Send follow-up messages to your inactive contacts. Filter by tags, source, or inactivity duration. Built-in anti-spam protection.
tour.tags_desc: Organize your contacts with custom tags. Use them to filter campaigns, segment your audience, and track your customers.
tour.lifecycle_desc: Define customer journey stages (prospect, client, VIP...). The AI automatically classifies your contacts based on their interactions.
tour.teams_desc: Invite team members and assign them WhatsApp sessions. Each member can manage their conversations independently.
tour.stats_desc: Analyze your performance: message volume, response time, activity per session. Filter by period and by session.
tour.settings_desc: Configure your profile, change the language, manage notifications, and customize your {appName} experience.
tour.ready_desc: Begin by: 1) Connecting a WhatsApp session, 2) Creating an AI agent, 3) Optionally adding documents. The AI will then respond automatically!
tour.dash_whatsapp_desc: Here you can see whether your WhatsApp number is connected, its quality rating, and access its profile. This is the channel your customers message you on, and where your AI agent replies.
tour.dash_shopify_desc: Here you can see whether your Shopify store is linked. Once connected, the AI agent knows your products, pages and policies, and can track your customers' orders.
tour.conv_list_desc: All your WhatsApp conversations appear here. Click one to see the messages, and spot at a glance which contacts have unsubscribed or are handled by the AI.
tour.conv_tags_desc: Filter conversations by tag, channel or lifecycle stage. Tags help you organise contacts and target your campaigns.
tour.conv_summary_desc: This button asks the AI to analyse a conversation: it writes a summary and automatically sorts it into the right stage (lead, customer, needs follow-up…).
tour.conv_orders_desc: When your Shopify store is linked, this panel shows the orders of the customer in the conversation: status, tracking, amount. Ideal for support without leaving the screen.
tour.conv_ai_title: Turn the AI on or off
tour.conv_ai_desc: This switch enables or disables the AI agent FOR THIS conversation. Turn it off to reply to a customer yourself, and back on whenever you like.
tour.agent_customize_desc: Click « Configure » to set everything: its name, mascot, tone, instructions, when it hands over to a human, and its knowledge base. Click the mascot to change its avatar.
tour.automations_desc: Automations send a WhatsApp message automatically when an event occurs: order paid, shipped, delivered, cart abandoned… all without any action from you.
tour.transactional_desc: « Transactional » reacts to order events (confirmation, tracking, support). « Campaigns » (in the sidebar) are for marketing: follow-ups and promotions sent to an audience you choose.
tour.automation_new_desc: Click here to build a flow. An AI assistant helps you create it: messages, delays, buttons, conditions — and even suggests the templates to submit to Meta for approval.
tour.campaign_new_desc: Launch a marketing campaign: pick your audience (tags, inactivity…), your message and the send date. Anti-spam safeguards are built in to protect your number quality.

wizard.title: Agent Creation Assistant
wizard.description: Answer a few questions to automatically configure your AI agent.
wizard.type_question: What type of agent would you like to create?
wizard.type_conversation_desc: Responds to contacts via an exclusive link, in test mode, after qualification, or following a follow-up campaign. Does not respond to spontaneous incoming messages.
wizard.type_relance_desc: Personalizes the opening message in campaigns. Reserved for the Scale plan.
wizard.type_qualifier_desc: Automatically responds to all incoming messages on a session (must be enabled on the session). Can work standalone or redirect to a conversation agent based on the contact's need.
wizard.qualifier_config_desc: The qualifier responds to all incoming messages on the session and can redirect to a specialized conversation agent.
wizard.qualifier_step_1: A contact sends a message on your WhatsApp session
wizard.qualifier_step_2: The qualifier responds and identifies the contact's need
wizard.qualifier_step_3: It continues alone or redirects to the matching conversation agent
wizard.qualifier_routes_later: You can configure routing scenarios after creating the agent.
wizard.company_desc_placeholder: E.g.: Mixed hair salon specializing in coloring...
wizard.role_title: What will the agent's role be?
wizard.escalation_title: When to hand off to a human?
wizard.hook_placeholder: E.g.: Hello! It's been a while since we last saw you...
wizard.hook_help: This message will serve as a basis for the first contact. The AI will adapt it.
wizard.continue_desc: The agent can respond to subsequent messages
wizard.business_desc: This information will be used by the agent to answer questions.
wizard.fallback_message: Message when the agent can't answer
wizard.fallback_placeholder: E.g.: I'll forward your question to an advisor...
wizard.alert_threshold: Alert a human after N exchanges without resolution
wizard.alert_help: If the conversation exceeds this number of exchanges, a human will be alerted.

onboarding.cat_order_pitch: Keeps your customers informed at every step: confirmation, payment, shipping, delivery, refund.
onboarding.cat_order_example: E.g.: order shipped → Marie gets her tracking link, automatically.
onboarding.cat_contact_pitch: Welcomes every new contact and turns visitors into WhatsApp subscribers.
onboarding.cat_contact_example: E.g.: new sign-up → instant welcome message.
onboarding.cat_conversation_pitch: Reacts to what happens in the chat: button clicks, silences, read messages.
onboarding.cat_conversation_example: E.g.: no reply for 24h → polite follow-up.
onboarding.cat_scheduled_pitch: Scheduled sends to build loyalty: birthdays, key dates, campaigns.
onboarding.cat_scheduled_example: E.g.: birthday → wishes + personalized promo code.
onboarding.plan_starter_desc: To get started with an autonomous AI agent on WhatsApp.
onboarding.plan_pro_desc: For stores that want to automate their support and sales.
onboarding.plan_scale_desc: For high volume, with the best model and priority support.
onboarding.family_transactional_pitch: Automatic order-related messages (confirmation, shipping, support). Sent no matter what.
onboarding.family_marketing_pitch: Welcome, follow-ups, birthdays, scheduled… To engage and retain (subject to anti-spam rules).
onboarding.shopify_intro: Xeyo is set up from your store (catalog, policies, pages).
onboarding.shopify_authorize_hint: Shopify will ask you to authorize the app, then bring you back here automatically.
onboarding.shopify_autorefresh_hint: This page updates itself as soon as the store is linked. Keep it open.
onboarding.shopify_already_installed_desc: Open Xeyo from your Shopify admin (Apps → Xeyo) and click "I already have a Xeyo account": the store will be linked to this account.
onboarding.sync_intro: We're gathering everything needed to personalize your workspace.
onboarding.sync_background_hint: Meanwhile, the AI is already preparing your messages and your agent behind the scenes ✨
onboarding.widget_intro_1: Xeyo is installed on your store, but you still need to
onboarding.widget_intro_3: no visitor will be able to leave you their number
onboarding.widget_wa_warning: You can enable the blocks now, but
onboarding.widget_wa_warning_strong: they will stay invisible on your store
onboarding.widget_wa_warning_end: until a WhatsApp number is connected (there would be no one to contact).
onboarding.widget_later_hint: You can do it later, but contact collection won't start before then.
onboarding.wa_intro: Connect your WhatsApp Business account via Meta. Without WhatsApp, your messages and automations will be ready but
onboarding.wa_secure_window_hint: You'll pick your number in a secure Meta window (WhatsApp's owner). No credentials to copy.
onboarding.toast_wa_fields_required: The 3 WhatsApp Business fields are required
onboarding.agent_generating: The AI is preparing your agent from your store…
onboarding.agent_try_desc: It already knows your store. Ask it a question like a customer would.
onboarding.agent_config_hint_1: Name, tone, instructions and human handoff: editable anytime from
onboarding.templates_no_create: 🔒 nothing is created before your approval
onboarding.templates_draft_note: 📝 Saved as drafts, to submit to Meta once WhatsApp is connected
onboarding.automations_intro_1: Your automations, organized like in the app: the
onboarding.automations_intro_3: . Turn on the ones that speak to you. They're created
onboarding.automations_intro_4: , you'll launch them when you're ready.
onboarding.plan_desc: 7-day free trial. You can change plan or interval anytime.
onboarding.promo_hint: The discount will show on the Shopify screen before you confirm.
onboarding.toast_no_shopify: No Shopify store linked. Reopen the app from your Shopify admin.
onboarding.support_message: Hi, I need help setting up Xeyo.

banner.tokens_exhausted: AI token limit reached, AI is suspended.
banner.trial_ended: Your trial period has ended. Subscribe to continue using {appName}.
banner.subscription_expired: Your subscription has expired. Renew to continue using {appName}.

contact_profile.title: Contact Profile
contact_profile.description: Information and notes about the contact
contact_profile.summary_empty: Generate an AI summary based on conversation history.
contact_profile.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this contact and all their conversations? This action is irreversible.

test_chat.title: Test: {name}
test_chat.subtitle: Test your agent's responses in real time
test_chat.empty_hint: Simulate a WhatsApp conversation with your agent
test_chat.refine_empty_hint: Tell it what you like or dislike about its replies, the AI will rewrite the system prompt accordingly.
test_chat.refine_placeholder: E.g. It's too formal, make it warmer and more casual...
test_chat.refine_hint: Your feedback tunes the agent's system prompt

confirm_delete.default_desc: This action is irreversible. Are you sure you want to continue?

templates.page_subtitle: Meta pre-approved messages, required to re-engage a customer outside the 24-hour window.
templates.whatsapp_prereq_desc: Message templates are tied to your WhatsApp Business account: they're submitted there for Meta approval. Connect your WhatsApp from the dashboard to start creating your templates.
templates.empty_desc: Templates are Meta pre-approved messages (order confirmation, abandoned cart, promo…), essential to reach a customer outside the 24-hour window.
templates.dirty_approved_active: stays active on Meta and keeps being sent.
templates.source_language_hint: Source language (others are translated from it).
templates.category_locked_hint: The category of an already submitted template can't be changed (Meta rule).
templates.type_locked_hint: The type of an already submitted template can't be changed.
templates.type_carousel_hint: Intro message + swipeable product cards (1 to 10).
templates.type_lto_hint: Countdown + promo code. Marketing category required.
templates.lto_expiry_help: Expiry is computed at send time (now + duration).
templates.lto_buttons_note: You MUST add both buttons below (required by Meta): "Copy code" (promo code) AND a "Visit site" link button.
templates.body_placeholder: Hi {{1}}, your order #{{2}} is confirmed! Delivery expected on {{3}}.
templates.variables_replaced_hint: Variables {{1}}, {{2}}… will be replaced at send time.
templates.how_create: How would you like to create your template?
templates.generate_ai_desc: I answer 3 questions, the AI suggests.
templates.ai_greeting: Hi! Describe the message you want to create, for example "re-engage an abandoned cart" or "notify that the order has shipped".
templates.select_or_create: Select a template or create one.
templates.carousel_media_hint: All cards use the same media type (Meta rule). 1 to 10 cards.
templates.card_body_placeholder: Purifying cleanser with salicylic acid. Removes impurities.
templates.carousel_preview_empty: Add cards to preview the carousel.
templates.toast_all_defaults: You already have all the default templates
templates.toast_modified_resubmit: Template modified, "resubmit needed". The approved version stays active; resubmit to Meta to apply your changes.
templates.toast_modified_draft: Template modified, back to draft. Resubmit it to Meta to apply the changes.
templates.toast_ai_no_proposal: No proposal, please refine your request.
templates.ai_proposals_intro: Here are 3 proposals based on your request 👇
templates.dirty_meta_2: version stays active on Meta and keeps being sent. Your changes will move to
templates.dirty_nometa_2: on Meta. If you save, it will go back to
templates.edge_error: The message cannot {where} with a variable. Add text {side}.
templates.glued_error: A variable is stuck to text ("{glued}"). Meta rejects sending: add a space before and after the variable.

usecase.marketing_desc: Offers, new arrivals, promo codes, newsletters…

macros.heading: Macros
macros.description: Saved replies, insertable in 1 click from the chat (⚡ button).
macros.content_placeholder: Thanks for your message! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

components.shopify_connect_desc: The AI agent replies using your catalog, FAQs and policies.
components.shopify_detail_desc: What the AI agent knows about your store.
components.shopify_no_links: No link detected. Resync if you have added pages or policies.
components.shopify_injected_note: The catalog, pages and policies are automatically injected into all your agents. To check, ask an agent (e.g. "What is your return policy?").
components.shopify_disconnect_confirm_desc: The link with {store} will be removed, along with the synced information (catalog, pages, policies) for this store. Your AI agent and the documents you added manually are kept. You can then connect another store.
components.shopify_shop_taken_title: This store is already connected to another account
components.shopify_shop_taken_desc_1: is linked to another Xeyo account. A store can only be linked to one account. Sign in with the owner account, or ask them to disconnect it before linking it here.
components.shopify_install_btn: Install from the Shopify App Store
components.shopify_install_hint: Shopify will ask you to authorize access, then bring you back here. This page will update automatically.
components.shopify_toast_taken: This store is already linked to another account.
components.shopify_toast_not_installed: Store not found — reinstall the app.
components.shopify_toast_already_synced: Already up to date, nothing to resync.
components.whatsapp_quality_title:
The quality rating comes from Meta: it measures your recipients' satisfaction (blocks and "spam" reports on your messages).

🟢 Good: few or no complaints, you can send normally.
🟡 Medium: rising complaints, reduce marketing and make sure your contacts have opted in, or risk restriction.
🔴 Critical: too many complaints, Meta will restrict your number. Xeyo automatically pauses marketing to protect it.

Support replies don't affect this rating.
components.whatsapp_sends_title: Unique contacts reached by your automations/campaigns over the last 24h. Support replies (24h window after a customer message) don't count. Your exact limit is visible in WhatsApp Manager.
components.whatsapp_marketing_paused_desc: Meta rated your number as critical quality. Xeyo paused campaigns and follow-ups to protect your number; support and transactional messages continue. Automatic reactivation as soon as it returns to green.
components.whatsapp_link_desc: Share this link so your customers can start a WhatsApp conversation in one click.
components.whatsapp_welcome_placeholder: Hi, I'm coming from your store!
components.whatsapp_connect_desc: Link your number so the AI agent can reply to your customers.
components.whatsapp_embedded_hint: You'll choose your WhatsApp Business account in a secure Meta window. No credentials to copy.
components.whatsapp_toast_fields_required: All WhatsApp Business fields are required
components.whatsapp_toast_imported: WhatsApp connected, {count} template{plural} imported from your account.
components.contact_profile_desc: Information and notes about the contact
components.contact_shopify_not_linked: Not linked to a Shopify customer (no orders visible until the account is identified).
components.contact_language_hint: Used to send templates in the right language.
components.contact_summary_empty: Generate an AI summary based on the conversation history.
components.contact_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this contact and all its conversations? This action is irreversible.
components.usage_title: {planLeft} AI conversation(s) left out of the {planLimit} included in the {planName} plan
components.lifecycle_manage_desc: Lifecycle stages are used to classify your conversations (new, in progress, customer, lost…).
components.lifecycle_ai_hint_strong: The AI relies on each stage's description
components.lifecycle_ai_hint: to decide where to file a conversation. The more precise the description (what the contact says or does), the more accurate the classification.
components.lifecycle_empty: No stage yet. Create one below.
components.lifecycle_edit_desc_placeholder: Instruction for the AI: when should a conversation be filed here? (e.g. the contact requests a refund or reports a problem)
components.lifecycle_no_desc_warning: No description — the AI classifies this stage poorly
components.lifecycle_new_desc_placeholder: Description for the AI (required): when does a conversation belong to this stage? (e.g. the contact asks about pricing or requests a quote)
components.lifecycle_toast_desc_required: Add a description: it's what lets the AI classify accurately.
components.lifecycle_toast_edit_desc_required: The description is required: the AI uses it to classify.
components.tools_notif_var_none: The message must contain {{1}} (the notification content).
components.tools_notif_var_start: Meta rejects a message that starts with the variable: add text before {{1}}.
components.tools_notif_var_end: Meta rejects a message that ends with the variable: add text after {{1}}.
components.tools_notif_submit_err: Submission failed, template saved as draft
components.tools_oauth_credentials_desc: Your Google credentials, reusable across all your agents.
components.tools_cred_delete_confirm: Delete "{name}"? Associated tools will lose their OAuth connection.
components.tools_notif_types_desc_1: The official API only allows free-form messages if the recipient wrote in the last 24h. Each type below is a Meta-approved template: your notifications go out anytime, and the agent picks the right type.
components.tools_no_vehicle: No vehicle configured. Add at least one vehicle.
components.tools_oauth_redirect_desc_1: Copy this URL and add it in
components.campaign_eligible_desc: {count} eligible contacts based on your targeting criteria. Check the contacts to include in the campaign.
components.campaign_toast_page_selected: {count} contacts selected on this page. Navigate to other pages to select more.
